claim_summary:
Phase 10 — Walk-forward backtests + match-mode bands.

Runs the strategy on each of days 5-2/5-3/5-4 with both `--match-trades worse`
and `--match-trades all`. Reports per-day per-product PnL, Sharpe, drawdown.
raw_excerpt:
"""Phase 10 — Walk-forward backtests + match-mode bands.

Runs the strategy on each of days 5-2/5-3/5-4 with both `--match-trades worse`
and `--match-trades all`. Reports per-day per-product PnL, Sharpe, drawdown.
"""
